name: bounding_box_analysis_check_overlap_between_two_elements
desc: Do the two elements' bounding boxes overlap? Default mode = axis-aligned; set mode=oriented for SAT on rotated elements. Returns {overlaps, overlap_volume_mm3, reason}.

parameters.name: tolerance_mm
parameters.description: Optional overlap tolerance in mm. Default 0.

keywords: bounding box analysis check overlap between two elements
